features.title: Key Features of ChatGPT Image 2
features.description: Everything you need for modern AI image generation and editing workflows centered around the keyword ChatGPT Image 2.

items.title: High-Quality Generation and Editing
items.description: ChatGPT Image 2 is designed for both generating new images and editing existing ones, making it suitable for end-to-end creative workflows.

items.title: Stronger Prompt Adherence
items.description: It follows detailed instructions more reliably, which is especially useful for composition control, scene edits, text placement, and commercial design tasks.

items.title: Reference Image Fidelity
items.description: Upload reference images to preserve style, subject details, product structure, or brand elements with better consistency during image-to-image editing.

items.title: Text Rendering and Transparent Backgrounds
items.description: Well-suited for posters, social graphics, stickers, and product assets that need text in image or transparent background output.

items.title: Flexible Sizes and Commercial Visuals
items.description: Supports a range of image sizes and practical workflows for ecommerce, marketing creatives, social content, and branded image production.

items.title: Quality-First Output
items.description: Optimized for image quality rather than ultra-low latency, so complex generations may take longer but are better suited for polished final visuals.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about ChatGPT Image 2

items.question: What is ChatGPT Image 2?
items.answer: ChatGPT Image 2 is the product positioning used on this site for an image generation and editing experience built around OpenAI's latest image capabilities. In API-facing terms, the closest current model reference is gpt-image-2.

items.question: What can ChatGPT Image 2 do well?
items.answer: It is well suited for text-to-image generation, image-to-image editing, reference-driven restyling, text rendering inside images, transparent background outputs, and commercial creative production.

items.question: Why is ChatGPT Image 2 different from older image models?
items.answer: Its practical strengths are stronger prompt adherence, better reference image fidelity, more reliable image editing, and improved support for use cases like posters, ecommerce assets, stickers, and branded content.

items.question: Can I upload images and edit them?
items.answer: Yes. ChatGPT Image 2 supports image editing workflows, so you can upload one or more reference images and guide changes with detailed instructions.

items.question: Does ChatGPT Image 2 support text in image and transparent backgrounds?
items.answer: Yes. These are two of the most useful characteristics highlighted in the current product positioning, especially for social graphics, product assets, logos, and sticker-like outputs.

items.question: Is ChatGPT Image 2 optimized for speed?
items.answer: It is better described as quality-first. Complex prompts or detailed edits can take longer, but the model is positioned for higher-quality generation and editing rather than minimum latency.
